title: AL's Ghasts Revamped x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Ghasts Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a86380a4614998aaad6fcce8209e1260f90e4db5.png)

# 

This pack makes AL's Ghasts Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

 

Since AL's Ghasts Revamped uses a custom model for it's Ghast and Happy Ghast, on it's own, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This addon pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

 

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
